violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Sandwiches and other food products discarded; not to be used until proper temperature is maintained.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Flour bin noted not properly labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Fanguards inside walkin cooler noted in need of cleaning. Holes in wall behind dishmachine need filled. Wall behind dishmachine needs reseal.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in ware-washing area noted with holes need repair.
